title: Netball players battle it out to reach league finals
bodyText:
NETBALL NEWS AND GALLLERY  - Netball players - women and men - from across the Southern Cape battled it out at the Van Riebeeck Stadium in Mossel Bay on Saturday 31 August. Teams from George, Knysna, Plettenberg Bay, Oudtshoorn and Great Brak River participated in the league event.


> These were the play-offs and semi-finals of the Eden Netball Federation's league which started earlier in the year.


The league finals will be held on Saturday 14 September, also at Van Riebeeck Stadium, and starting at 14:00.

Everyone is welcome to attend and support. For the most up-to-date information, visit the Eden Netball Federation's Facebook or Instagram pages.

View a photo gallery here: Netball players battle it out for league finals

Men's results

Royal Crusaders 29 - 25 Infantry

Jaguars 31 - 30 Royal Crusaders

Infantry 17 - 32 Omgee Rehab

Women's results

Blues 26 - 12 Divas A2

Divas A1 39 - 21 Great Brak River

NMU A 22 - 12 Divas B

Kranshoek 23 - 25 Winter Roses

Kranshoek 27 - 32 Evergreens

NMU A 17 - 21 George Royal Academy A

Happy Hearts 16 - 38 Divas A2

The Divas A2 team from George are, from left: Michelle Scholtz, Dominique van Heerden, Luchell Peterson, Chante Maree, Louisa Tarentaal, Vone Fortuin, Lize-Tharien Malan and Luzaan Barnard. Seated is Charmonay Ruiters.

Umpires Rozelle Otto, Ashleen Prins, Nadia Jacobus-Julies, Jolanda Peens, Tarien Strauss, Johanna Marais and Mona Venter pose for a quick photo.‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
